screen: Knowledge Transfer to be provided by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to view a list of knowledge transfer tasks I am responsible for providing, so that I can track my obligations and their status
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Knowledge Transfer to be provided by me screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list with Task, Provider, Receiver, Assigner, Project, Start date, Due date and Status columns

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be provided by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to search knowledge transfer tasks using filters, so that I can quickly find the relevant tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then only tasks matching the criteria are displayed

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be provided by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can start a new query without manually clearing each field
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters return to their default values and the full list is shown

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be provided by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter tasks by active or inactive employees, so that I can focus on the relevant workforce segment
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the screen; When I choose Active employees or Inactive employees; Then the list reflects only tasks for the selected employee type

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be provided by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter tasks by a date period using From and To calendars, so that I can review tasks within a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I open the Period From and To calendars; When I select a date range; Then only tasks within that range are listed

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be provided by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter tasks by department, so that I can review knowledge transfer obligations for a specific department
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the screen; When I select a department; Then only tasks for that department are displayed

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be provided by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter tasks by status such as Assigned, Initiated, Reassigned, Received, Pre closed or Withdrawn, so that I can monitor tasks at each lifecycle stage
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the screen; When I select a status value; Then only tasks in that status are displayed

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be provided by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to see a weekly day breakdown (Su through Sa) alongside each task, so that I can understand the day-wise schedule of my knowledge transfer work
acceptance_criteria: Given tasks are listed; When I view the schedule columns; Then each task shows its Su to Sa day indicators
